reference_answer: Aquatics manager Ben Orta held custody of the lane-reservation tablet.
DR-7 proposed allowing every youth coach to reserve two early-morning lanes from the tablet.
DR-7 remained draft pending recreation committee vote.
The recreation committee approved early-morning lane entry only for head coaches listed on the season roster.
TE-7 was noncontrolling because it copied DR-7 before the recreation committee vote and omitted CF-7.
